endpoint_schema.title: Pipedrive Stages
endpoint_schema.description: Returns an array of pipeline stage objects. Each stage is a logical component of a pipeline that can hold deals.

order_nr.description: Defines the order of the stage within its pipeline

is_deleted.description: Whether the stage is marked as deleted or not

deal_probability.description: The success probability percentage of the deal. Used/shown when the deal weighted values are used.

pipeline_id.description: The ID of the pipeline the stage belongs to

is_deal_rot_enabled.description: Whether deals in this stage can become rotten

days_to_rotten.description: The number of days the deals not updated in this stage would become rotten. Applies only if is_deal_rot_enabled is set.

pipeline_id.description: The ID of the pipeline to fetch stages for. If omitted, stages for all pipelines will be fetched.
